config.post_snippet:
if $PlayMode == 1
$DildoSpeed = $PlayProgress
endif
$PlayProgress = $PlayProgress - 0.001
if $PlayProgress < 0
    $PlayProgress = 0
endif

if $PlayProgress > 1
    $PlayProgress = 1
endif

elements.hover_event_formula:
local $Step
local $Direction

if $PlayMode == 1
    $Step = ($CursorY - $PositionY) / $SizeY

    $Direction = $PlayValue - $Step
    $mathinA = $Direction
    run = CommandListMathABS
    $Direction = $mathout
    $PlayProgress = $PlayProgress + ($Direction * 0.05)
    

    
    $PlayValue = $Step
    x24 = ($CursorY - $PositionY) / $SizeY
endif
